# Anduril and Raytheon Successfully Test Highly Loaded Grain Rocket Motor for Air-to-Air Weapons

Anduril and Raytheon validate advanced solid rocket motor with Highly Loaded Grain technology, delivering enhanced range and performance for air-to-air weapons.
